race.comment: OMOLONG (1) expensive colt who let down well on debut with a sharp win over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Stable apprentice goes on and can finish over the top of these with the fast tempo anticipated. SATIN SUMMER (3) resumes. Led throughout on debut when too slick over the 1000m at Randwick last January. Covered ground in the run with a battling fifth in the LR Lonhro over 1000m at Randwick last February. Primed with the two trials and must be respected. KOTOR (14) well-bred I Am Invincible filly from the good producing mare Mousai on debut for the Baker yard. Has impressed in both trial wins and only has to handle the surface. SWEET LEAF (15) came to town at her second race start for a cheeky on-pace fourth over 1100m at Randwick. Fitter now and gets a similar set-up with the blinkers going on. Keep safe. JOINT VENTURE (6) I Am Invincible colt on debut for the Waller yard. Trialled well and looks good each-way value. Respect.
